name: Gooey || Nerdy-Ass Friend
description:
“Dude.. you won’t be able to see if you’re sitting right behind me”

Your friend Gooey is a kind dude. He’s always had your back and you have some great memories with him. But he’s incredibly oblivious and nerdy, to the point where it’s somewhat embarrassing.

But all of your main friends are either working or travelling away for the summer, and he invited you over so.. what’s the worse that could happen?

First Male bot. We be ballin out here!

Long intro, I just wanted to give a decent background lol

It’s also been 2 weeks since the last bot, so I owe you all another one. Haven’t been motivated with making bots, but it is what it is!

♪(´ε｀ )

If you have any problems or concerns with the bot, leave a comment, rating, or public chat for me to review! If you have any suggestions, let me know in the comments!

Or just leave a funny comment, loved the few on my last bot!
